# Fear! Fire! Foes!

> [!note] 📖 Event · Cost: **2** · Lore

---

Secrecy 1. Play only if you do not control a **_Warrior_** hero.
**Action**: Choose a non-unique enemy and an attribute (Threat, ATK, or DEF). Until the end of the phase, reduce the chosen attribute of that enemy to 0.
